class ServerConfiguration:
    # Violation: a class with dozens of instance attributes is usually multiple cohesive concepts hiding as one
    def __init__(self):
        self.host = "localhost"
        self.port = 8080
        self.use_tls = True
        self.tls_cert = "cert.pem"
        self.tls_key = "key.pem"
        self.db_host = "10.0.0.1"
        self.db_port = 5432
        self.db_user = "admin"
        self.db_pass = "secret"
        self.timeout = 30
        self.retries = 3
